# Rdanalysis

**Summary**: A method used to measure the reaction rates and diffusion coefficients of acids with carbonate rocks.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2017-ahmed-2|AHMED, 2017]] used RDA to determine the diffusion coefficient (De) for both waste oil and diesel emulsified acid systems at HPHT.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The study confirmed that De values are significantly lower at high pressure/temperature compared to low pressure/temperature, impacting design accuracy. ([[2017-ahmed-2|AHMED, 2017, p. 14]])
